notes.purpose: Workspace MCP starter config for team-shareable, safe defaults.
notes.secrets: Do not store secrets here. Use environment variables and local machine secret stores.
notes.team_vs_local: Commit only safe shared entries. Keep machine-specific overrides in untracked local files.

repo-knowledge.description: Repo knowledge server: search ADRs/runbooks and run grep-like queries across docs/code.

local-dev.description: Local dev server: run lint/tests/build checks in a constrained allowlist.

apps.notes: MCP Apps are opt-in UI-returning tools. Start disabled until reviewed by the team.
